subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him whose record hath prevailed in that Presence round which circle the denizens of the Concourse on High and the spirits [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن فاز کتابه فی محضر یطوف حوله اهل ملا الاعلی ثم ارواح
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
